title: Trade the weather or the Fed rate on Hyperliquid with @tingsxyz
summary_title: Things: Trading Exotic Perpetuals on Hyperliquid From Weather to Fed Rates
summary_description: Canadian founders building permissionless perp markets for real-world signals like weather, unemployment, and commodity prices on Hyperliquid.

key_moments.label: Host introduces Things team, Canadian builders launching on Hyperliquid
Founders explain core idea: trading signals directly instead of crypto proxies
Deep dive on oracle design: why weather, unemployment, commodities are ideal
Technical oracle construction: multi-source feeds, weather formula using Kelvin
Funding challenge discussed: raising HLP for market deployment, considering Volantis
Testnet launching next week with points program: 20% supply for testers, trading competition
Referral program details, fee structure, and custom codes for communities
Why Hyperliquid: permissionless deploys, best community, fair treatment for all builders
